name: Grow RiotML imported fixture corpus with minimal stage0 support

description: Baseline with existing imported syn fixture count

asi.hypothesis: Measure current passing imported fixture corpus before adding translated fixtures.

description: Imported syn 0017 string literal fixture using existing local string let and println support

asi.hypothesis: A simple old syn string binding translates directly to a RiotML main with a local string let and deterministic println, increasing corpus without compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised existing local string let, path expression, and println support.

description: Imported syn 0016 empty string fixture with deterministic blank-line stdout

asi.hypothesis: An empty string binding is supported by existing stage0 string handling and adds corpus coverage for zero-length literals.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered existing empty string literal through local let and println.

description: Imported syn 0029 parenthesized string fixture and added narrow parenthesized expression parsing

asi.hypothesis: Adding parser-only support for parenthesized expressions is the smallest feature needed for the old parenthesized string fixture.
asi.feature_added: Parenthesized expressions in stage0 parser, preserving existing AST/checker/IR by returning the inner expression.

description: Imported syn 0003 bool let fixture with narrow bool literal println support

asi.hypothesis: A small constant-value path through parser and checker can support boolean literals and println without adding general boolean operations.
asi.feature_added: Boolean literals in parser/checker; println of constant bool values lowers to runtime string output true/false.

description: Imported syn 0019 false literal fixture using existing bool println path

asi.hypothesis: The newly added bool constant support should handle false literals directly and grow coverage with no additional compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; covered false branch of boolean literal printing.

description: Imported syn 0030 parenthesized bool fixture using existing paren and bool support

asi.hypothesis: The combination of parenthesized expression parsing and bool constant support should cover parenthesized bool fixtures without further compiler changes.
asi.feature_added: No new compiler feature; exercised parenthesized boolean literal printing.
